strengths: Recent and direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows.
Extensive background in deep backend, distributed systems, microservices, and real-time data processing.
Relevant fintech industry exposure through work at RIDE Capital and Optilyz.
concerns: Lacks explicit evidence of executive-level engineering leadership and organizational scaling (10 to 30+ people).
Limited detail on production experience operating agentic AI systems over a significant period, given recent start date.
Insufficient demonstration of specific expertise in LLM selection, fine-tuning, evaluation, and AI-system reliability best practices beyond general 'AI-agent infrastructure'.
response.justification: Bogdan brings strong technical depth in highly relevant areas like distributed systems and real-time processing, coupled with recent, direct experience in agentic AI infrastructure and prior work in fintech. While his technical skills are impressive and align well with the core product, the resume does not clearly demonstrate the executive-level leadership, organizational scaling, and team development experience critical for a CTO role at a rapidly growing scale-up.
